root_text.an4.2:1.1: “Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi asamannāgato ‘imasmā dhammavinayā papatito’ti vuccati.
root_text.an4.2:1.3: Ariyena, bhikkhave, sīlena asamannāgato ‘imasmā dhammavinayā papatito’ti vuccati.
root_text.an4.2:1.4: Ariyena, bhikkhave, samādhinā asamannāgato ‘imasmā dhammavinayā papatito’ti vuccati.
root_text.an4.2:1.5: Ariyāya, bhikkhave, paññāya asamannāgato ‘imasmā dhammavinayā papatito’ti vuccati.
root_text.an4.2:1.6: Ariyāya, bhikkhave, vimuttiyā asamannāgato ‘imasmā dhammavinayā papatito’ti vuccati.
root_text.an4.2:1.7: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi asamannāgato ‘imasmā dhammavinayā papatito’ti vuccati.
root_text.an4.2:2.1: Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato ‘imasmā dhammavinayā apapatito’ti vuccati.
root_text.an4.2:2.3: Ariyena, bhikkhave, sīlena samannāgato ‘imasmā dhammavinayā apapatito’ti vuccati.
root_text.an4.2:2.4: Ariyena, bhikkhave, samādhinā samannāgato ‘imasmā dhammavinayā apapatito’ti vuccati.
root_text.an4.2:2.5: Ariyāya, bhikkhave, paññāya samannāgato ‘imasmā dhammavinayā apapatito’ti vuccati.
root_text.an4.2:2.6: Ariyāya, bhikkhave, vimuttiyā samannāgato ‘imasmā dhammavinayā apapatito’ti vuccati.
root_text.an4.2:2.7: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato ‘imasmā dhammavinayā apapatito’ti vuccatīti.

translation_text.an4.2:1.1: “Someone without four things is said to have ‘fallen from this teaching and training’.
translation_text.an4.2:1.7: Someone without these four things is said to have ‘fallen from this teaching and training’.
translation_text.an4.2:2.1: Someone with four things is said to be ‘secure in this teaching and training’.
translation_text.an4.2:2.7: Someone with these four things is said to be ‘secure in this teaching and training’.
translation_text.an4.2:3.3: The work is done, the joyful is enjoyed,
